Frequently Asked Questions

We stand behind this course 100%. If you're not completely satisfied within 7 days of purchase, simply email us and we'll issue a full refund — no questions asked, no hassle. We're confident the course will deliver real value, but we want you to feel completely risk-free when enrolling.
Absolutely not. This course is designed for entrepreneurs and business owners — not developers. Every AI tool covered is practical, no-code, and ready to use from day one. If you can use a smartphone or a laptop, you're good to go.
Students report significant revenue growth within weeks of applying the tools — better lead pipelines, lower ad costs, faster content creation, and more efficient customer management. Results depend on how consistently you apply what you learn, but the tools are designed for immediate impact.
Yes. The strategies and tools taught work across industries — e-commerce, services, consulting, retail, B2B, B2C, and everything in between. Whether you're a solo founder just starting out or running an established business looking to scale, the AI tools in this course will give you a real edge.
After enrolling, you get instant access to the full course on SkillsUniversity.org. You can start learning immediately and revisit any module as many times as you want. You'll also get access to course updates automatically as they're released.
